# Clang Crash: Assertion NumBits <= MAX_INT_BITS failed in IntegerType::get with large ext_vector_type

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/165458
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, confirmed, crash, generated by fuzzer

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/9fE8sP7PG
- It crashed on clang `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer


Console:

```c
typedef _Bool bool512 __attribute__((ext_vector_type(187553262)));

bool512 b;
```

Assertion:

```console
clang: /root/llvm-project/llvm/lib/IR/Type.cpp:321: static llvm::IntegerType* llvm::IntegerType::get(llvm::LLVMContext&, unsigned int): Assertion `NumBits <= MAX_INT_BITS && "bitwidth too large"' failed.
```

Backtrace:


```c
typedef _Bool bool512 __attribute__((ext_vector_type(187553262)));
bool512 b;
```

---

### Comment 2 - shafik

Please, take a little more care when copying the information into the report, the code should be in a separate block from the rest of the report. This allows us to just copy and paste the code using githubs copy tool-tip. It would also be helpful to have the command line also be in a separate block.

Looks like this goes back to clang-15.

---
